heading: Short title
label: 609 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Communications Act of 1934.”
notes: Editorial Notes

References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Communications Act of 1934, which enacted this chapter, amended , , Commerce and Trade, section 487 of former Title 46, Shipping, and sections 1, 2, 5, and 15 of former Title 49, Transportation, and repealed sections 484 to 487 of former Title 46. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act June 19, 1934, ch. 65248 Stat. 1064section 35 of this titlesection 21 of Title 15
